FFmpeg source/license provenance (macOS arm64 bundle)

- Workflow reference: Openresearchtools-Engine/.github/workflows/macos-arm64.yml
- Upstream source repository: https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg
- Pinned source tag: n8.0.1
- Pinned source commit: 894da5ca7d742e4429ffb2af534fcda0103ef593
- Upstream pinned tag URL: https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/tree/n8.0.1
- Upstream pinned commit URL: https://github.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/commit/894da5ca7d742e4429ffb2af534fcda0103ef593

Configure/build flags used in workflow:

- --enable-shared
- --disable-static
- --disable-gpl
- --disable-version3
- --disable-nonfree
- --disable-autodetect
- --disable-xlib
- --disable-libxcb
- --disable-libxcb-shm
- --disable-libxcb-xfixes
- --disable-libxcb-shape
- --disable-vulkan
- --disable-libplacebo
- --enable-pic
- --disable-programs
- --disable-doc
- --cc=clang
- --arch=arm64
- --target-os=darwin

LGPL text source:

- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/FFmpeg/FFmpeg/master/COPYING.LGPLv2.1
